allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'pos-motos|server\\.js' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'server\\.js' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "e:\\guardando datos\\pos-motos-facturacion\\backend"; npx prisma migrate deploy 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "node: $\(\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object\).Count\)")
PowerShell($p = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("procesos node: " + \($p | Measure-Object\).Count\); $p | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
